prompt: Apply the dark mode from the second image to the UI mockup.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the UI mockups, to convert them from a light theme to a dark mode. The dark mode's color scheme and element style should mirror the dark grey backgrounds and light foreground elements seen in the mobile UI screens of image 2.
objects: Two dark mode mobile UI mockups
Dark mode website header with "yoga studio" logo, navigation links, and search bar
Dark mode hero image section with overlaid text
Dark mode section with three circular icon cards and descriptive text
Dark mode "Latest From Blog" section with article previews
Dark mode "Get In Touch" contact form with input fields and button
Dark mode website footer with navigation links and copyright
Light-colored UI text and icons against dark grey backgrounds
